ownerDashboard.subtitle: Take care of your pets’ grooming with ease ✨
ownerDashboard.quickBookDescNoPets: Add a pet profile first to book
ownerDashboard.noPetsBody: Add your pet’s profile before your first groom — it helps us tailor gentle care just for them.
ownerDashboard.noRecentSubtitle: Your pet care activity will show up here

groomerDashboard.subtitle: Here’s your day — wishing you and the pets a lovely one 🐾
groomerDashboard.summaryDesc: A quick look at today’s appointments
groomerDashboard.calendarDesc: Manage your schedule and time off
groomerDashboard.legendAvailable: Available (gaps not listed are still open)

groomerBooking.title: Manual booking
groomerBooking.subtitle: Phone or walk-in — same slot checks as online booking.
groomerBooking.sourceOnlineHint: Customer booked online; you’re recording it
groomerBooking.fillAll: Choose pet, service, date, and time slot
groomerBooking.toastCreatedDesc: Refresh today’s list or calendar to see it

clients.title: Client management
clients.subtitle: Track client history, services, and lasting relationships
clients.listSubtitle: View all owner profiles and jump into client detail quickly.
clients.listTableDesc: Search owners by name or email.
clients.detailSubtitle: View profile, pets, and service history in one place.
clients.petsCardDesc: All pets under this owner account (with avatar)
clients.groomerNotePlaceholder: Add notes for groomer (temperament, habits, handling tips)
clients.serviceHistoryDesc: Filter appointment records by date range.
clients.invalidDateRange: From date cannot be later than to date.
clients.devSubtitle: More helpful tools are on the way!
clients.devIntro: Client management is in progress. Soon you’ll be able to:
clients.featureProfilesDesc: See client and pet details in one place

admin.subtitle: Manage the system and groomer accounts

adminUsers.title: Admin — Users
adminUsers.subtitle: Create groomer accounts and manage access.
adminUsers.placeholderBody: User listing will be added next. For now, you can create groomer accounts with the button above.

createGroomer.title: Create groomer
createGroomer.subtitle: Groomer accounts can only be created by admins.

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.pwMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

createGroomer.toastOkDesc: The groomer account was created and can now log in.
createGroomer.toastFailDesc: Please check the fields and try again.

adminUsers.resetDesc: Enter a new password (at least 6 characters), set by the admin.

preview.title: Appointment preview
preview.subtitle: Today and the next 7 days (excludes cancelled).
preview.emptyTitle: No appointments today or in the next few days

adminUsers.sectionUsersDesc: View and manage Owner / Groomer / Admin accounts.
adminUsers.selfProtect: You cannot delete your own account
adminUsers.deleteWarn: This cannot be undone. Please confirm.
adminUsers.toastResetOkDesc: An email with the new password was sent to the user.
adminUsers.toastResetEmailSkipped: Password saved, but the email was not sent. Configure Resend or share the password manually.

adminHub.hint: Manage accounts, homepage promotions, and a quick booking snapshot.
adminHub.shortcutClientsDesc: View owner profiles, pets, and service history.
adminHub.shortcutUsersDesc: Search accounts, verify emails, reset passwords, or remove users.
adminHub.shortcutPromoDesc: Upload banner art, titles, and expiry dates.
adminHub.shortcutPreviewDesc: Today and the next 7 days at a glance.

adminPromotions.modalSubtitle: Upload images and publish homepage promo cards
adminPromotions.toastFill: Please add title, expiry date, and an image.
adminPromotions.deleteConfirmDesc: It will disappear from the homepage and the image file will be removed.
